def chunk_text(text, chunk_size=CHUNK_SIZE, overlap=CHUNK_OVERLAP):
    lines = text.split("\n")
    chunks = []
    current_chunk = []
    current_tokens = 0
    for line in lines:
        line_tokens = estimate_tokens(line)
        if current_tokens + line_tokens > chunk_size and current_chunk:
            chunks.append("\n".join(current_chunk))
            overlap_lines = []
            overlap_tokens = 0
            for l in reversed(current_chunk):
                lt = estimate_tokens(l)
                if overlap_tokens + lt > overlap:
                    break
                overlap_lines.insert(0, l)
                overlap_tokens += lt
            current_chunk = overlap_lines
            current_tokens = overlap_tokens
        current_chunk.append(line)
        current_tokens += line_tokens
    if current_chunk:
        chunks.append("\n".join(current_chunk))
    return chunks

        \"\"\"Compress pesan lama jadi ringkasan singkat.\"\"\"
        system = self.messages[0]
        rest = self.messages[1:]

        if len(rest) <= keep_recent + 4:
            return  # belum perlu compress

        to_compress = rest[:-keep_recent]
        keep = rest[-keep_recent:]

        # Buat ringkasan dari pesan yang mau di-compress
        summary_parts = []
        for msg in to_compress:
            role = msg.get(\"role\", \"\")
            if role == \"user\":
                content = msg.get(\"content\", \"\")[:100]
                summary_parts.append(f\"User: {content}\")
            elif role == \"assistant\" and not msg.get(\"tool_calls\"):
                content = msg.get(\"content\", \"\")[:150]
                if content:
                    summary_parts.append(f\"AI: {content}\")
            elif role == \"assistant\" and msg.get(\"tool_calls\"):
                for tc in msg[\"tool_calls\"]:
                    name = tc.get(\"function\", {}).get(\"name\", \"\")
                    summary_parts.append(f\"[tool: {name}]\")

        if not summary_parts:
            self.messages = [system] + keep
            return

        summary = \"[HISTORI RINGKASAN]\\n\" + \"\\n\".join(summary_parts[-15:])
        compressed = [
            system,
            {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": f\"[Sistem: Berikut ringkasan percakapan sebelumnya]\\n{summary}\"},
            {\"role\": \"assistant\", \"content\": \"Oke, gue udah tangkap konteksnya. Lanjut!\"},
        ]

        self.messages = compressed + keep
        self.notify(\"🗜️ history dikompress (pesan lama di-ringkasan)\")'''

new = '''    def _compress_history(self, keep_recent=10):
        \"\"\"Compress pesan lama: try LLM summarize, fallback to naive truncation.\"\"\"
        system = self.messages[0]
        rest = self.messages[1:]

        if len(rest) <= keep_recent + 4:
            return

        to_compress = rest[:-keep_recent]
        keep = rest[-keep_recent:]

        # Build text representation for summarizer
        summary_parts = []
        for msg in to_compress:
            role = msg.get(\"role\", \"\")
            if role == \"user\":
                summary_parts.append(f\"User: {msg.get('content', '')[:200]}\")
            elif role == \"assistant\" and not msg.get(\"tool_calls\"):
                content = msg.get(\"content\", \"\")[:200]
                if content:
                    summary_parts.append(f\"AI: {content}\")
            elif role == \"assistant\" and msg.get(\"tool_calls\"):
                for tc in msg[\"tool_calls\"]:
                    name = tc.get(\"function\", {}).get(\"name\", \"\")
                    summary_parts.append(f\"[tool: {name}]\")
            elif role == \"tool\":
                content = msg.get(\"content\", \"\")[:100]
                summary_parts.append(f\"[result: {content}]\")

        if not summary_parts:
            self.messages = [system] + keep
            return

        # Try LLM summarize — cheap model, 1 call
        summary = None
        try:
            conv_text = \"\\n\".join(summary_parts[-25:])
            summarize_prompt = (
                \"Ringkas percakapan berikut dalam 5-8 kalimat. Simpan: keputusan penting, \"
                \"file yang dibuat/diubah, error yang ditemukan, solusi yang berhasil. \" 
                \"Buang detail teknis yang tidak penting.\\n\\n\" + conv_text
            )
            resp = self.provider.chat(
                [{\"role\": \"system\", \"content\": \"Kamu adalah summarizer. Ringkas dengan tepat.\"},
                 {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": summarize_prompt}],
                []
            )
            summary = resp.get(\"content\", \"\").strip()
            if summary:
                summary = \"[RINGKASAN PERCAKAPAN SEBELUMNYA]\\n\" + summary
                self.notify(\"🗜️ history dikompress (LLM summary)\")
        except Exception:
            pass  # fallback to naive

        # Fallback: naive truncation
        if not summary:
            summary = \"[HISTORI RINGKASAN]\\n\" + \"\\n\".join(summary_parts[-15:])
            self.notify(\"🗜️ history dikompress (naive summary)\")

        compressed = [
            system,
            {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": f\"[Sistem: Berikut ringkasan percakapan sebelumnya]\\n{summary}\"},
            {\"role\": \"assistant\", \"content\": \"Oke, gue udah tangkap konteksnya. Lanjut!\"},
        ]

        self.messages = compressed + keep'''

if old in s:
    s = s.replace(old, new)
    open('agent.py','w').write(s)
    print('LLM SUMMARIZE ADDED')
else:
    print('PATTERN NOT FOUND')

    def _compress_history(self, keep_recent=10):
        """Compress pesan lama jadi ringkasan singkat."""
        system = self.messages[0]
        rest = self.messages[1:]

        if len(rest) <= keep_recent + 4:
            return  # belum perlu compress

        to_compress = rest[:-keep_recent]
        keep = rest[-keep_recent:]

        # Buat ringkasan dari pesan yang mau di-compress
        summary_parts = []
        for msg in to_compress:
            role = msg.get("role", "")
            if role == "user":
                content = msg.get("content", "")[:100]
                summary_parts.append(f"User: {content}")
            elif role == "assistant" and not msg.get("tool_calls"):
                content = msg.get("content", "")[:150]
                if content:
                    summary_parts.append(f"AI: {content}")
            elif role == "assistant" and msg.get("tool_calls"):
                for tc in msg["tool_calls"]:
                    name = tc.get("function", {}).get("name", "")
                    summary_parts.append(f"[tool: {name}]")

        if not summary_parts:
            self.messages = [system] + keep
            return

        summary = "[HISTORI RINGKASAN]\n" + "\n".join(summary_parts[-15:])
        compressed = [
            system,
            {"role": "user", "content": f"[Sistem: Berikut ringkasan percakapan sebelumnya]\n{summary}"},
            {"role": "assistant", "content": "Oke, gue udah tangkap konteksnya. Lanjut!"},
        ]

        self.messages = compressed + keep
        self.notify("🗜️ history dikompress (pesan lama di-ringkasan)")

    def _trim_history(self):
        """Trim history kalau udah kelebihan context window."""
        limit = int(self.provider.context_window * self.auto_trim_ratio)
        tokens = self._estimate_tokens(self.messages)

        if tokens <= limit:
            return

        # Coba compress dulu
        self._compress_history(keep_recent=8)
        tokens = self._estimate_tokens(self.messages)

        if tokens <= limit:
            return

        # Kalau masih kelebihan, pangkas dari yang paling lama
        system = self.messages[0]
        rest = self.messages[1:]
        while rest and self._estimate_tokens([system] + rest) > limit:
            msg = rest.pop(0)
            if msg.get("role") == "assistant" and msg.get("tool_calls"):

    def chat(self, messages, tools, on_token=None):
        system, conv = self._convert_messages(messages)
        stream = on_token is not None

        resp = _request_with_retry(
            requests.post,
            "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
            headers={
                "x-api-key": self.api_key,
                "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01",
                "content-type": "application/json",
            },
            json={
                "model": self.model,
                "max_tokens": config.MAX_TOKENS,
                "system": system,
                "messages": conv,
                "tools": self._convert_tools(tools),
                "stream": stream,
            },
            timeout=60,
            stream=stream,
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
